description: Style Notefrench connection, the edgy, attitudinal, high street British fashion brand sets out to create well-designed and fashion-forward clutches with a quirky spin on design. The clutches are all spacious, with multiple compartments and organiser pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the fcuk clutches provides you with a superb array of ideas.Product DetailsBlack clutch with a narrow flap fastened by a claspOne main zippered compartment with an organizer pouchMaterial and CareShell: 72% nylon and 28% polyester and lining is 100% polyesterWipe surface with a clean, dry clothDo not store in direct sunlightSizeHeight: 19 cmWidth: 30 cm
